channel.title: Frontion News - Global Geopolitics Headlines
channel.description: Curated breaking geopolitical news from Tier 1 sources worldwide

item.title: 🇳🇴 Norway holds Chinese woman in custody on suspected espionage charges
item.description: A Norwegian court ruled that a Chinese woman suspected of complicity in espionage will be held in police custody for up to four weeks while authorities investigate the case.

item.title: 💻 US suspects Nvidia chips smuggled to China via Thailand in billions-dollar scheme
item.description: A firm linked to Thailand national AI initiative is suspected of helping smuggle Super Micro servers with advanced Nvidia chips to China, Bloomberg reported, amid ongoing US-China tech tensions.

item.title: 🇬🇷 Greek authorities investigate Ukrainian-made naval drone found in island cave
item.description: Police and coast guard sources are investigating a drone boat discovered by fishermen in a cave on the Ionian island of Lefkada, raising questions about its origin and purpose.

item.title: 🇨🇳 China exports accelerate in April as Iran war drives global stockpiling
item.description: Chinese export growth likely quickened in April as companies worldwide rushed to secure components amid fears the Iran conflict could push input costs higher, a Reuters poll shows.

item.title: 🇩🇪 German industrial production unexpectedly falls 0.7% in March
item.description: German industrial output dropped unexpectedly in March, decreasing 0.7% from the previous month, the federal statistics office reported, signaling continued weakness in Europe largest economy.

item.title: 🇺🇸🇮🇷 US Expects Iranian Response to Peace Proposal as Fighting Flares in Gulf
item.description: The United States expects an Iranian response as soon as Friday to its latest proposal to end the war, even as US and Iranian forces traded fire and the UAE came under renewed attack.

item.title: 💰🇺🇸 Dollar Slips as Investors Pin Hopes on US-Iran Peace Resolution
item.description: The dollar slipped Friday, on pace for a second straight weekly fall as investors stayed cautiously optimistic about a swift end to the Middle East conflict after Trump said the ceasefire remained in place.

item.title: 🇬🇧🗳️ Questions Mount Over UK PM Starmer Future After Election Losses
item.description: British Prime Minister Keir Starmer has vowed to carry on as leader after his Labour Party suffered heavy losses to the populist Reform party, deepening doubts over his ability to govern.

item.title: 🇷🇺🇪🇺 Kremlin Says Putin Ready to Negotiate With EU But Wont Make First Move
item.description: President Vladimir Putin is ready to negotiate with everyone including the Europeans, the Kremlin said, after reports EU leaders were preparing for potential talks.

item.title: 🌍📊 Global Perceptions of US Fall Below Russia Under Trump, Survey Finds
item.description: Global favorability toward the United States has dropped below that of Russia for the first time in a major international survey, reflecting widespread concerns about American foreign policy.

item.title: 🇹🇷 Iranian and Turkish Foreign Ministers Review Status of US-Iran Talks
item.description: Turkey foreign minister discussed the latest developments in US-Iran negotiations with his Iranian counterpart, as Ankara continues its role as a regional mediator.

item.title: 🇺🇳 US Opposes Israeli West Bank Annexation Plans at UN Security Council
item.description: A US diplomat told the UN Security Council that Washington opposes Israeli annexation of the West Bank, marking a shift in US policy toward Israeli settlements.

item.title: 🇪🇺 Marco Rubio Backs NATO Amid Simmering US-Italy Tensions
item.description: US Secretary of State Marco Rubio reaffirmed American commitment to NATO during a Rome visit, even as tensions between Washington and European allies over defense spending continue.

item.title: 🛸 Pentagon Releases Decades of Top-Secret UFO Files to Public
item.description: The Pentagon has begun releasing previously classified UFO files spanning decades, with officials saying the public can draw their own conclusions about unexplained aerial phenomena.

item.title: 📈 Markets Track Middle East Conflict as Investors Await Peace Developments
item.description: Global markets continue to monitor developments in the Middle East closely, with oil prices, currencies and equities all sensitive to any breakthrough in US-Iran negotiations.

item.title: 🇮🇷 Iran Says It Seized Oil Tanker Over Attempts to Disrupt Its Oil Exports
item.description: Iran stated it seized an oil tanker in response to attempts to disrupt its oil exports, amid ongoing tensions in the Strait of Hormuz and Gulf region.

item.title: 🇪🇺⛽ Europe Made Mistake Moving Away From Nuclear Power, IEAs Birol Says
item.description: IEA Executive Director Fatih Birol said Europe made a strategic error by moving away from nuclear power, arguing the continent needs to reconsider its energy mix for climate and security goals.

item.title: 🇬🇧 UK Labour Party Suffers Heavy Losses as Reform Gains in Elections
item.description: British Prime Minister Keir Starmer Labour Party suffered significant losses in local elections as Nigel Farage Reform party made substantial gains across England.

item.title: 🚗 Toyota Sees 20 Percent Drop in Annual Profit as Iran War Weighs
item.description: Toyota forecast a 20 percent drop in annual profit as the Iran conflict disrupts global supply chains and increases costs for the world largest automaker.

item.title: ⚖️ US Trade Court Rules Against Trump 10 Percent Global Tariff
item.description: A US trade court struck down Trump 10 percent global tariff, dealing a blow to one of the president key trade policies and setting up potential appeals.

item.title: 🇮🇷 Iranian State Broadcaster Says Enemy Units Came Under Missile Fire After US Attack
item.description: Iran state media reported that enemy units came under missile fire following US attacks, as both sides traded fire despite Trump insistence that a ceasefire remained in effect.

item.title: 🇰🇵 North Korea Kim Inspects Navy Destroyer and Weapons Production Plants
item.description: North Korean leader Kim Jong Un inspected a new naval destroyer and weapons production facilities, state media reported, highlighting continued military development despite international sanctions.

item.title: 🔥 Death Toll Rises to 37 in China Fireworks Factory Explosion
item.description: The death toll from a fireworks factory explosion in China has risen to 37, authorities confirmed, as investigations continue into one of the country deadliest industrial accidents this year.

item.title: 🇮🇱⚔️ AP Reports on Iran-Israel-US War Developments as Ceasefire Tested
item.description: The Associated Press provides comprehensive coverage of the ongoing Iran-US-Israel conflict, with the fragile ceasefire facing its sternest test as military actions continue.

item.title: 🤖 US Marine Corps Looking for Robots to Build Airfields
item.description: The US Marine Corps is exploring autonomous robotics technology to rapidly construct forward operating bases and airfields, part of broader efforts to modernize military construction capabilities.
